WP06 ready: ListingCacheKeyBuilder + cache integration tests. 9 unit tests + 10 integration tests prove FR-037 key composition and end-to-end resolver+TaggedCache flow (miss/store/hit, tag invalidation, TTL, request-context parity, FR-058 error tolerance, NFR-003 sentinel). Source stub from WP05 was already canonical per spec — no source change required.
Started review via action command

review.reference: WP06 review passed. ListingCacheKeyBuilder.php unchanged from WP05 (0-line diff) and matches FR-037 spec verbatim: listing:<def>:<exposed>:<ctx>, SHA-256 truncated to 16 hex chars, ksort applied pre-encoding, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR + UNESCAPED_SLASHES. Unit tests (9) cover all 6 required cases — determinism, def/exposed/ctx distinctness, order-invariance (ksort), regex format match (line 124), plus subtle-input collision smoke and length stability bonus. Integration tests (10) prove cache MISS->HIT via mutate-storage-between-calls (driver->write('99') after first resolve; second resolve still returns [1,2,3], proving query bypass behaviourally — strong), invalidation by entity-tag and row-tag, TTL via real sleep(2), RequestContext-affected access ops change key, FR-058 graceful fallback via anonymous TaggedCacheInterface composing MemoryBackend (final). NFR-003 sentinel: 50-sample p95 < 50ms (CI-friendly bound for 0.5ms target — meaningful regression guard). Scope pristine: 2 new test files (729 LOC), zero source mutation. Gates: listing 208/362 pass, cache 172/356, foundation 969/2122, cs-check + phpstan + composer-policy + layers all green.

WP07 ready: cache invalidation wired via lifecycle events. 8 files / 5 subtasks T033-T037. AfterSaveEvent + AfterDeleteEvent gain additive affectedLangcodes property (backwards compatible — all existing dispatch sites compile unchanged). Backfill landed in CoordinatorLifecycleDispatcher (M-006 translatable write path); WP07 owned_files listed SqlStorageDriver but that's a pure I/O layer that does not dispatch events — deviation documented in commit body. Test gates: entity-storage 558, listing 216, cache 172, foundation 969 (all passing). cs-check, phpstan, check-composer-policy, check-package-layers all green. Commit: d81b32781.
WP07 implementation complete: ListingCacheInvalidator wired via lifecycle events with additive affectedLangcodes patch. All gates green.
Started review via action command

review.reference: WP07 review passed: ListingCacheInvalidator + affectedLangcodes event surface. Deviation 1 (events in entity-storage not foundation) is correct — events already lived in entity-storage as of M-006 squash-merge 509e31fb7; spec owned_files list was stale. Deviation 2 (backfill in CoordinatorLifecycleDispatcher not SqlStorageDriver) is correct — SqlStorageDriver does not dispatch lifecycle events (pure I/O); CoordinatorLifecycleDispatcher is the canonical dispatch site for the M-006 translatable write path. All 4 existing dispatch sites (EntityRepository, RevisionableSqlBlobStorage, RevisionableSqlColumnStorage, EntityDestination) still compile with positional args since affectedLangcodes is optional with default null — backwards compat verified by passing entity-storage suite (558/558). FR-038 ✓ (event surface gains affectedLangcodes — getter accessor pattern matches existing accessor style: entity(), saveContext(), isNewRevision()). FR-039 ✓ (CoordinatorLifecycleDispatcher backfills via computeAffectedLangcodes from translationOps keys for save + translationLangcodes for delete; non-translatable → null). FR-040 ✓ (best-effort: ListingCacheInvalidator wraps invalidateByTag in try/catch, logs at warning level via LoggerInterface, continues — see continuesAfterCacheBackendErrorAndLogsWarning test). FR-041 ✓ (canonical tags entity:<type>, entity:<type>:<id>, entity:<type>:<id>:<langcode> emitted per emitsLangcodeTagPerAffectedLangcodeOnSave). Listener registration: NO AsEventListener attribute used (correctly deferred to WP11 ServiceProvider per contract — codebase uses ServiceProvider-based subscription pattern, e.g. EntityWriteAuditListener, SearchIndexSubscriber, not attribute discovery). Layer discipline: pass (Listing layer 3 depends on entity-storage layer 1 downward; listener is PUSH-invoked by dispatcher). Gates: cs-check clean, phpstan OK (1335 files), check-composer-policy OK, check-package-layers OK. Tests: entity-storage 558/558, listing 216/216, cache 172/172, foundation 969/969. Commit d81b32781.

review.reference: WP08 review passed: ExposedFilterParser + Coercer + permissive/strict modes complete. Listing 276/479 PASS (incl. 54 new), all gates green (cs/phpstan/policy/layers). ExposedFilterValues unchanged from WP05 stub (verified zero diff, spec-matched, WP06 pattern). Type-resolver-as-Closure accepted: FilterDefinition has no expectedType field per WP01 contract, parser needs a bridge; spec Risks section anticipated this gap; withTypeResolver() is additive to stable §5.X surface (Closure(FilterDefinition):non-empty-string), default value-shape inference is a reasonable production-default. Coercion matrix: every row has positive+negative tests incl. type aliases (int/integer, float/double, bool/boolean, datetime/date), BETWEEN single/three-parts/empty-bound, IN empty-raw/empty-element/bad-element. ListingCoercionException carries all 5 fields (param, raw, operatorName, expectedType, reason) via readonly public props. Minor: ExposedFilterCoercer::coerce() takes 4 args (param prepended) vs contract's 3 — internal surface, justified for exception payload propagation. Cosmetic lint noise at ExposedFilterParserTest.php:234 (unused $f closure param required by signature) — non-blocking.

review.reference: WP10 review passed. All 9 rules (A-I) implemented in ListingDefinitionValidator with paired positive + negative unit tests (24 total) plus 5 boot-chain integration tests in Phase14 going through real ListingDiscoverer -> ListingDefinitionRegistry::fromList() -> ListingDefinitionValidator (no shortcut to validate() directly). Listing 316/316, cache 172, foundation 969 - all clean. cs-check, phpstan, check-composer-policy, check-package-layers all green. PackageManifestCompiler.warm() integration deferred to WP11: verified PackageManifestCompiler has only compile()/compileAndCache()/load() - no warm() method exists; adding the boot hook is genuine WP11 scope. WP11 MUST: (1) introduce the warm()/validate-step hook in PackageManifestCompiler (or chosen kernel boot point), (2) wire ListingDefinitionValidator into it post entity-type registration and pre route-dispatch (FR-052), (3) add an integration test proving the validator is invoked by actual kernel boot (not just the chain stub used here).

WP11 ready: ServiceProvider DI wiring + EventEntity/UpcomingEventsListing reference consumer + Phase14 integration tests. WP10 validator wired at boot via ServiceProvider::boot() hook. Listener registration via dispatcher->addListener() at priority=100. review.reference: WP11 approved. ServiceProvider::boot() wires validator AFTER ProviderRegistry.register() loop (kernel two-pass at packages/foundation/src/Kernel/Bootstrap/ProviderRegistry.php:71/145), so EntityTypeManager is fully populated when validator runs (FR-052/FR-053 fail-fast). Listener registration via Symfony dispatcher addListener() at priority=100, matches WP07 pattern. Phase14 ListingPipelineIntegrationTest + ListingCacheInvalidationIntegrationTest (24 tests, 101 assertions) cover happy-path resolve, exposed filter, pagination, cache tags/contexts, validator gate, end-to-end AfterSaveEvent invalidation, and dispatcher-registration assertion. Real-boot test is a chain stub (not a kernel.boot() call) but structurally equivalent to ProviderRegistry's two-pass — docstring claim of 'boots a real kernel' is overstated; flag for WP12 docs cleanup but not blocking. Gates: cs-check clean; phpstan 1340/1340 OK; check-composer-policy OK; check-package-layers OK. Pre-existing Phase13 SSR/OIDC/SurfaceMap failures not touched by WP11 diff (only 5 new files: ServiceProvider.php, EventEntity, UpcomingEventsListing, 2 Phase14 tests). Untracked WP04/WP12 folders unrelated to WP11 deliverables.
